text: Lujon's Village is an unnamed village exclusice to the 2003 anime. It is home to the betrothed couple Lujon and Lydia as well as the main setting of Reunion of the Fallen. Many of its inhabitants were afflicted with the unusual Fossil Disease, which progressively turns those affected into stone. The disease was held at bay for a time, however by the end of the episode, the entirety of the town's population has fallen victim to it and died. The only person not to suffer from the disease, Lujon, was murdered by Lust, who is revealed to have orchestrated the entire disease in a failed attempt to get a Philosopher's Stone.
